title: Daily Wrap — Friday 22 May 2026
body: 7 meetings — Albion Park, Dubbo, Geelong, Gloucester Park, Mildura, Newcastle, and Wagga — made up the day’s 60-race harness action.

One of the standout performances in defeat came from Cardigan Dan, who produced the day’s fastest calculated finishing burst — an estimated individual last half of 53.8 — despite finishing 2nd at Wagga.
